name: Atlantic-Congo
notes: Classification-only clade node for the Atlantic-Congo branch. Carries no phonology: it is never a data-inheritance source, only a step in the ancestry chain from which `family` is derived. Top-level node for what the older literature calls Niger-Congo; Glottolog recognises Atlantic-Congo (atla1278) as the demonstrable family.

sources.author: Hammarström, Harald; Forkel, Robert; Haspelmath, Martin; Bank, Sebastian
sources.title: Glottolog 5.0
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
